---
title: early-return
description: "Prefer early returns that reduce nesting."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Prefer early returns that reduce nesting. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if ready { process() } else { return }
```

## Good

```go
if !ready { return }
process()
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only early-return`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
